tagline: Record once. Create interactive demos and documentation.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to DocFlow to keep creating and managing interactive documentation.
registerSubtitle: One account is all you need to start building clear, guided documentation.
toRegister: New to DocFlow? Create an account
toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
secureHint: Secure sessions protect your account and workspace

errors.google_link_required: A DocFlow account already uses this email. Sign in with your password, then connect Google in Personal settings.
errors.google_registration_disabled: Automatic Google registration is not enabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.google_domain_denied: This Google email domain is not allowed by the platform.
errors.google_email_unverified: Your Google email is not verified and cannot be used to sign in.
errors.google_access_denied: Google authorization was cancelled or denied.
errors.google_state_invalid: The sign-in request expired. Please try again.
errors.google_not_configured: Google sign-in is not fully configured.
errors.google_email_mismatch: The Google email does not match your current DocFlow account.
errors.google_identity_conflict: This Google account is already connected to another DocFlow account.
errors.google_login_failed: Google sign-in failed. Try again or contact an administrator.
